title: ReMIX PROJECT Redesigning European cropping systems based on species MIXtures
subtitle: FROM THEORY TO PRACTICE OF SPECIES MIXTURES
description: Guide presenting the ReMIX Horizon 2020 project on agro-ecological intercropping of species mixtures in European cropping systems. It describes the multi-actor co-design approach, 52 technical data sheets from farmers’ experiences, and a study on the feasibility of harvesting and sorting mixed species crops.
